languages.original_text: "Perhaps after having the xenos' methods used on you, your appetite for studying them will have dwindled. At least, one can only hope."

languages.text: "Возможно, испробовав методы ксеносов на себе, вы охладите пыл к их изучению. По крайней мере, я буду на это уповать".
"Perhaps after having the xenos' methods used on you, your appetite for studying them will have dwindled. At least, one can only hope."
languages.original_text: "Возможно, испробовав методы ксеносов на себе, вы охладите пыл к их изучению. По крайней мере, я буду на это уповать".

traits.locale_text: "Perhaps after having the xenos' methods used on you, your appetite for studying them will have dwindled. At least, one can only hope."
"Perhaps after having the xenos' methods used on you, your appetite for studying them will have dwindled. At least, one can only hope."
"Perhaps after having the xenos' methods used on you, your appetite for studying them will have dwindled. At least, one can only hope."

languages.text: «Tal vez, ahora que ha sentido en sus carnes los métodos de los xenos, su deseo de estudiarlos se haya apagado. Esa es mi esperanza, al menos».
languages.original_text: "Perhaps after having the xenos' methods used on you, your appetite for studying them will have dwindled. At least, one can only hope."

traits.locale_text: «Tal vez, ahora que ha sentido en sus carnes los métodos de los xenos, su deseo de estudiarlos se haya apagado. Esa es mi esperanza, al menos».

languages.text: 「異種族の手法を自らに用いられた後となっては、それらを研究しようというあなたの意欲も、いくらか萎えたことだろう。少なくとも、そう願うばかりだ」
languages.original_text: "Perhaps after having the xenos' methods used on you, your appetite for studying them will have dwindled. At least, one can only hope."

traits.locale_text: 「異種族の手法を自らに用いられた後となっては、それらを研究しようというあなたの意欲も、いくらか萎えたことだろう。少なくとも、そう願うばかりだ」

languages.text: “或许当异形的手段落在你身上后，你研究它们的热情会减弱一些。至少我希望如此。”
languages.original_text: "Perhaps after having the xenos' methods used on you, your appetite for studying them will have dwindled. At least, one can only hope."

traits.locale_text: “或许当异形的手段落在你身上后，你研究它们的热情会减弱一些。至少我希望如此。”

languages.text: "Vielleicht schwindet Eure Lust, Xenos zu studieren ja, nachdem ihre Methoden auf Euch selbst angewandt wurden. Das hoffe ich jedenfalls."
languages.original_text: "Perhaps after having the xenos' methods used on you, your appetite for studying them will have dwindled. At least, one can only hope."

traits.locale_text: "Vielleicht schwindet Eure Lust, Xenos zu studieren ja, nachdem ihre Methoden auf Euch selbst angewandt wurden. Das hoffe ich jedenfalls."

languages.text: « Après avoir fait les frais des méthodes xénos, peut-être que votre désir de les étudier s'est amoindri. Du moins, peut-on l'espérer. »
languages.original_text: "Perhaps after having the xenos' methods used on you, your appetite for studying them will have dwindled. At least, one can only hope."

traits.locale_text: « Après avoir fait les frais des méthodes xénos, peut-être que votre désir de les étudier s'est amoindri. Du moins, peut-on l'espérer. »

languages.text: "Belki zenonun yöntemleri üzerinizde uygulandıktan sonra onları inceleme iştahınız azalmıştır. En azından insan ancak bunu umabiliyor."
languages.original_text: "Perhaps after having the xenos' methods used on you, your appetite for studying them will have dwindled. At least, one can only hope."

traits.locale_text: "Belki zenonun yöntemleri üzerinizde uygulandıktan sonra onları inceleme iştahınız azalmıştır. En azından insan ancak bunu umabiliyor."
